generated_oml:
// C2: Physical Acting Components
instance BuildingControlActuatorSystem : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building control actuators modeled within BIM environment including lighting dimmers, HVAC actuators, and automated door systems"
]

instance LightingDimmerActuator : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Lighting dimmer actuator for real-time adjustment of lighting levels based on DT-generated control signals"
]

instance HVACActuatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "HVAC actuator system for temperature setpoint adjustments and ventilation control based on operational parameters"
]

instance AutomatedDoorSystem : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Automated door system controller for seamless access management within the building infrastructure"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy sensors embedded in building rooms to detect presence and occupancy status"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataStream
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature/humidity probes installed in building environments to monitor environmental parameters"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalParameterStream
]

instance MotionDetector : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motion detectors for occupancy tracking and automated lighting control"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotionDetectionStream
]

instance EnergyMeter : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Energy meters for real-time monitoring of energy consumption across building systems"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionStream
]

instance LightingSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting sensors for visual comfort and energy efficiency monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightingParameterStream
]

// C4: Data Transmission Streams
instance OccupancyDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance EnvironmentalParameterStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance MotionDetectionStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotionDetector
]

instance EnergyConsumptionStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyMeter
]

instance LightingParameterStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightingSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMBuildingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Static 3D spatial and functional representation of building components including geometry, topology, and relationships"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance RuntimeMetadataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Extracted runtime metadata from BIM including device IDs, sensor types, and control logic configurations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance SensorConfigurationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM-based device modeling for sensor/actuator configurations and control logic definitions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngineVisualization
]

instance TwinLightFrameworkControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Control logic defined in BIM as part of TwinLight framework for automated commissioning and bidirectional communication"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance EnrichedBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantically enriched BIM model bridging static building information with dynamic operational data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, UnrealEngineVisualization
]

instance OperationalDataCollection : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated real-time operational data from building sensors including temperature, occupancy, and energy metrics"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataStream, EnvironmentalParameterStream, EnergyConsumptionStream, LightingParameterStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance ControlParameterData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Runtime parameters derived from DT for adjusting building systems (lighting levels, temperature setpoints)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RuntimeMetadataModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Lightweight IoT middleware for real-time data exchange between physical building sensors and DT components"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, ControlAutomationService
]

instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Distributed data store for managing and synchronizing operational data across DT components"
    DTDFVocab:enables OperationalDataCollection, ControlParameterData
]

instance UnrealEngineVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization platform for immersive monitoring of building conditions via Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, SensorConfigurationModel
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Framework enabling automated transformation of BIM models into operational DT artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:enables SensorConfigurationModel, TwinLightFrameworkControlModel
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization of building conditions (occupancy, energy usage, environmental parameters) via Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides ImmersiveBuildingMonitoringInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "AI-driven optimization of lighting and energy systems using reinforcement learning for energy efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight
]

instance ControlAutomationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated commissioning and bidirectional communication between BIM-defined control logic and physical devices"
    DTDFVocab:provides AutomatedControlAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance ImmersiveBuildingMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization dashboard showing occupancy patterns, energy consumption trends, and environmental parameters"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analysis of energy consumption patterns enabling optimized lighting and HVAC schedules"
]

instance AutomatedControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustments to physical building systems (lighting levels, temperature setpoints) based on DT-generated plans"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PerformanceReportGeneration : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generation of operational performance reports for facility managers and building stakeholders"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance MaintenanceSchedulePlanning : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Creation of task plans for predictive maintenance based on DT analytics"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C12: Environment Components
instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains BIMBuildingModel, OccupancySensor, TemperatureSensor, LightingDimmerActuator, HVACActuatorSystem
]

instance OperationalSystemsEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains EclipseHono, Ditto, UnrealEngineVisualization, PredictiveAnalyticsService, ControlAutomationService
]

instance ControlFrameworkEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains RuntimeMetadataModel, SensorConfigurationModel, TwinLightFrameworkControlModel
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT generates control outputs (e.g., lighting schedules, HVAC adjustments, energy optimization commands) via **standardized extension points** in the modular architecture. These commands are transmitted back to physical actuators through **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** middleware, ensuring bidirectional communication. The framework automates the mapping of virtual control logic (defined in BIM) to physical device configurations, enabling seamless real-time adjustments without manual intervention."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin operates with real-time synchronization, ensuring live data exchange between physical and virtual assets. The system supports continuous operation with minimal latency, though the exact time-scale specifics (e.g., sub-100ms synchronization) are not explicitly quantified in the documents; the focus is on real-time adaptability and bidirectional data flow."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented ecosystem** with the following components:
  1. **Central DT Framework**: Acts as a hub for bidirectional communication, real-time data processing, and service orchestration.
  2. **BIM-to-Runtime Pipeline**: Automates the transformation of BIM models into deployable DT artifacts (e.g., middleware configurations, control logic).
  3. **Middleware Layer**: **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** enables real-time data exchange between physical sensors/actuators and DT services.
  4. **Visualization Layer**: **Unreal Engine 5** provides immersive 3D interfaces for monitoring and control.
  5. **Service Layer**: Extensible extension points allow DT engineers to integrate custom services (e.g., AI-driven optimization, predictive maintenance) without altering the core framework.
  The constellation ensures **interoperability** via standardized protocols and modular design."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans all life-cycle stages of the building:
  1. **Design phase**: Enriched BIM models define static and dynamic BCS components (e.g., lighting control logic, sensor placements).
  2. **Construction phase**: Automated extraction of device metadata from BIM models for deployment (e.g., sensor/actuator configurations, network endpoints).
  3. **Operation phase**: Real-time synchronization with physical assets via **Eclipse Hono/Ditto**, enabling adaptive control and predictive maintenance.
  The framework ensures **end-to-end automation** from design to operation, with minimal manual intervention beyond initial BIM modeling and device configuration."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  1. **Model validation**: Pre-deployment validation of BIM models to detect semantic inconsistencies or missing metadata (e.g., device configurations).
  2. **Real-time synchronization**: **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** ensures low-latency, bidirectional data flow, minimizing drift between physical and virtual states.
  3. **ODTE metric**: Evaluates the **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement** to quantify the alignment between DT and physical building, highlighting interoperability and architectural soundness.
  4. **Runtime monitoring**: Continuous validation of control logic and sensor data accuracy via **facility manager interactions** and **DT engineer feedback**.
  The framework addresses **semantic drift** by automating the extraction of runtime semantics from BIM models, reducing manual intervention."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin establishes technical connections via Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware for real-time data exchange, enabling bidirectional communication between the physical asset and the DT. The system relies on standardized protocols for data transmission, ensuring interoperability across heterogeneous building systems."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin is deployed via an automated transformation pipeline that processes BIM models into runtime artifacts. The deployment process integrates with Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware for real-time data handling, without explicit mention of containerization (e.g., Docker/Kubernetes). The focus is on model-driven automation and standardized extension points for modular deployment."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin integrates horizontally with Building Control Systems (BCS) via standardized extension points, enabling seamless communication with non-DT systems (e.g., BCS controllers) and supporting interoperability across AECO workflows. The framework emphasizes modularity to facilitate future integration with external systems (e.g., ERP, CMMS) without disrupting core functionality."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards:
  1. **Building Information Modeling (BIM)**: Leverages BIM as the semantic backbone for modeling building geometry, topology, and component relationships.
  2. **Industry-Specific Frameworks**: Uses **Eclipse Hono** and **Ditto** for real-time data exchange, which are open-source and industry-standard middleware solutions.
  3. **Model-Driven Engineering (MDE)**: Follows MDE principles for automated transformations and extensibility, ensuring consistency across the DT lifecycle.
  No explicit mention of specific standards like **ISO 12006-2 (IFC)**, **OMG**, or **OMG DTMI** is provided."
]
